kept.text:
Archer Defense is now a defense technology supplier. When Anduril licenses technology from Archer Aviation, it automatically places Archer on the list of trusted suppliers, without Archer having to go through 5–7 years of bureaucracy.
https://t.co/2pLUxmkICv https://t.co/M1XlPZfsjC
